queries: OpenAI compute target 600 billion CNBC February 2026
OpenAI March 2026 update new models CNBC
action.query: OpenAI compute target 600 billion CNBC February 2026

queries: Google Gemini 3 Deep Think update February 2026 TechCrunch

annotations.title: OpenAI launches GPT-5.4 with Pro and Thinking versions | TechCrunch
Nvidia to invest $100 billion in OpenAI to help expand ChatGPT maker's computing power | AP News
Boston Dynamics & Google DeepMind Form New AI Partnership to Bring Foundational Intelligence to Humanoid Robots | Boston Dynamics
Thomson Reuters Convenes Global AI Leaders to Advance Trust in the Age of Intelligent Systems | Thomson Reuters
OpenAI will shutter Sora video app
Introducing the Tom’s Guide AI Awards 2026 | Tom's Guide

content.text:
Here are some notable AI news items in early 2026 (with exact dates for clarity). Want deeper details on any item?

- OpenAI launches GPT-5.4 with Pro and Thinking variants
  - Date: March 5, 2026
  - Key points: GPT-5.4 is OpenAI’s new frontier model, available in standard, Pro, and Thinking versions; API supports context windows up to 1,000,000 tokens; claims include improved efficiency and reduced error rates. ([techcrunch.com](https://techcrunch.com/2026/03/05/openai-launches-gpt-5-4-with-pro-and-thinking-versions/))

- Nvidia to invest $100 billion in OpenAI to expand computing power
  - Date: March 2026 (announcement reported around March 10, 2026)
  - Key points: The deal includes adding at least 10 gigawatts of Nvidia AI data centers to power OpenAI’s infrastructure; first gigawatt expected to deploy in H2 2026. This is part of a broader push to scale compute for OpenAI’s models. ([apnews.com](https://apnews.com/article/610d894d93f9be23c46762950997a67f))

- Boston Dynamics and Google DeepMind form a robotics partnership
  - Date: January 5, 2026 (announced at CES 2026)
  - Key points: Joint work to bring Gemini Robotics foundation models to Atlas humanoid robots, aimed at industrial tasks and manufacturing transformation. ([bostondynamics.com](https://bostondynamics.com/blog/boston-dynamics-google-deepmind-form-new-ai-partnership/))

- Thomson Reuters launches Trust in AI Alliance
  - Date: January 13, 2026
  - Key points: Founding participants include Anthropic, AWS, Google Cloud, and OpenAI; aim is to define principles for trustworthy, agentic AI and share practical insights for high-stakes environments. ([thomsonreuters.com](https://www.thomsonreuters.com/en/press-releases/2026/january/thomson-reuters-convenes-global-ai-leaders-to-advance-trust-in-the-age-of-intelligent-systems))

- Google highlights February 2026 AI updates (Gemini Deep Think, 3.1 Pro, etc.)
  - Date: February 2026 (recap published in February 2026)
  - Key points: Gemini 3 Deep Think upgrade; Gemini 3.1 Pro; Nano Banana 2 for image work; Lyria 3 for music; Gemini Flow updates for media work; Team USA video-analysis tools via Google Cloud. ([blog.google](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/products/google-ai-updates-february-2026/))

- OpenAI to discontinue Sora video app
  - Date: March 24, 2026
  - Key points: OpenAI is winding down Sora (video app and API) to focus resources on core and enterprise products; the move follows broader shifts in OpenAI’s roadmap and safety/compute priorities. ([axios.com](https://www.axios.com/2026/03/24/openai-discontinue-sora-video-app))

- Tom’s Guide AI Awards 2026 opened for nominations
  - Date: March 31, 2026
  - Key points: The awards recognize standout AI tools and features across categories (model, chatbot, image/video generation, etc.); deadline for entries is April 2, 2026; winners announced at month-end. ([tomsguide.com](https://www.tomsguide.com/ai/introducing-the-toms-guide-ai-awards-2026))

If you’d like, I can:
- Pull up full articles or official press releases for any item.
- Do a quick daily or weekly AI news digest focused on a topic you care about (policy, robotics, enterprise AI, etc.).
- Filter news by company (e.g., OpenAI, Google/DeepMind, Nvidia) or by sector (robotics, fintech, healthcare, etc.).
